svg.title: A dense Knowledge Arc with many books across traditions speaking to each other
svg.desc: A curved field anchored by a guiding question. Books from theory, memoir, novel, history, and poetry registers are scattered across the field, with threads connecting books that speak to each other. Notebook marks cluster around books, and Yumi observes from the margin.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about how arc questions get articulated and revised in Praxis')
g.text: The arc question · 14 books · 23 notebook entries

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me theory texts in this arc')
